sourceQuestion: Which product or feature is most suitable for deploying a Microsoft SQL cluster in a Nutanix environment?
decision: Use Nutanix Volumes for shared block/iSCSI-style SQL clustering scenarios. Created corrected question NCA610-STO-004.

sourceQuestion: Single chart with logical usage for three storage containers
decision: Metric Chart is more appropriate for one metric across multiple entities. Created corrected question NCA610-MON-001.
Main exam concept is application resiliency/data protection because RF1 maintains a single copy. Created corrected question NCA610-STO-005.

sourceQuestion: Virtual firewall on each node wants VM affinity to host
decision: Agent VM configuration is the better fit for per-host service appliance behavior. Created corrected question NCA610-VM-001.

sourceQuestion: Red heart best dashboard to isolate cause
decision: Health dashboard is the dedicated starting point for health checks and root cause isolation. Created corrected question NCA610-HEA-001.

sourceQuestion: CPU Ready time impacts which entity?
decision: CPU ready time is a VM CPU scheduling/contention metric. Created corrected question NCA610-VM-002.
